data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement 'Upgrade for additional credits', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for an upgrade for additional credits, yet no concrete API reads or persisted state checks were performed to verify this functionality. This lack of evidence indicates a gap in meeting the requirement, as the step did not capture any information regarding the upgrade process or its implementation.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the upgrade for additional credits.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add endpoint to verify upgrade for additional credits
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define a concrete API call that checks the availability and process for upgrading credits.
